# claudeplatform_user (Data Source)

Look up an organization member by email. Useful for claudeplatform_workspace_member.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `email` (String) Member email address (exact match).

### Read-Only

- `added_at` (String)
- `id` (String) User ID (user_...).
- `name` (String)
- `role` (String) Organization role.
